description: Màn hình giám sát các thông số theo biểu đồ (nhiệt độ, độ ẩm, lưu lượng nước, nồng độ pH).

requirements.description: Data model must support water flow and pH levels alongside existing temperature and humidity.
The Monitoring Screen must display line charts and bar charts for the specified metrics.
Charts must be built natively using Compose Canvas to avoid unregulated UI third-party SOUPs.

risks.description: Canvas rapid redraw operations out of memory during dense telemetry streams
risks.mitigation: Use flow sampling, remember() caches, and path optimizations for continuous data.
